description_long: This skateboard features a standard popsicle-shaped deck with a black grip tape surface and a natural wood edge visible along the sides. The deck is mounted on two orange wheels per side, attached via metal trucks that are partially visible from the side views. The grip tape is plain and unadorned, with visible mounting holes for the trucks. The wheels are classic street style, round and medium-sized, suitable for urban environments. The overall design is minimalistic, with no visible graphics or branding on the deck or wheels.
description: A classic skateboard with a black grip tape deck, natural wood edges, orange street wheels, and metal trucks. The design is minimal and unbranded.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded nose of the skateboard, black grip tape, and the front pair of orange wheels partially visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the deck, the black grip tape, natural wood edge, and both pairs of orange wheels and trucks.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the rounded tail, black grip tape, and rear wheels.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, with the same features visible.
attribute_wheel_type: street, orange, no visible text or logos
attribute_truck_style: standard, silver metal, top-mounted, no visible branding
attribute_grip_tape_pattern: solid black, no pattern or graphics
